text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove is totally going to win the Osaka Hai!
She's on a whole different level from the other
racers!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, I can't wait to be bathed in the light of the
Empress today! Go, Air Groove!

text_block_list.name: Female Dober Fan
text_block_list.text:
Yikes, seems like everyone is an Air Groove fan.
Just focus on yourself, Dober!

text_block_list.name: Male Dober Fan
text_block_list.text: Mejiro Dober, you can do it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Have you had a good look at the stands? They're
filled with Air Groove's fans. Her popularity is
nothing to sneeze at.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
But well, that's just reality. I'm still a long way
from the legacy I'm aiming for.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
And that's exactly why I'm going to chase after
Air Groove with all I have in this race!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I have to do everything I can, even if it's only to
get a little closer to my ideal!
choice_data_list: Save some of that energy for the race.
Save some of that energy for the race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...I know. It's not like I can keep pace with Air
Groove with enthusiasm alone.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
You're right. It's not like I can keep pace with Air
Groove with enthusiasm alone.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Air Groove... I look forward to racing you today!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I'm expecting nothing but your best performance,
Dober.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(I have to keep up with her. I can't let Air Groove
down!)
